summary: Final Stabilization Pass - ALL 7 ACCEPTANCE GATES PASSED. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All gates verified via Playwright. Invoice source correctly uses db.invoices collection. Admin sidebar is white shell. All table layouts follow Payment Queue pattern with Date column on left.

minor.issue: Still has invoices_v2 fallback comment - should be cleaned up
Still has invoices_v2 comment - should be cleaned up

action_items: OPTIONAL: Clean up invoices_v2 references in invoice_payment_routes.py and campaign_performance_routes.py
critical_code_review_comments: InvoicesPageV2.jsx has conditional pay button logic (lines 23-31)
OrdersPageOps.jsx uses full-width table with Date column first (line 208)
InvoicesPage.jsx (admin) uses full-width table with Date column first (line 218)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 acceptance gates passed. Invoice consolidation complete - all backend code uses db.invoices collection exclusively. Admin sidebar is white shell. All tables follow Payment Queue pattern with Date column on left. Customer invoice drawer has conditional pay button (Pay Invoice for pending_payment, Pay Balance for partially_paid, no button for paid/under_review).

GATE_1_CUSTOMER_INVOICES_TABLE.details: Customer invoices at /dashboard/invoices shows full-width table with Date column on left. data-testid='invoices-table' present.

GATE_2_CUSTOMER_INVOICE_DRAWER.details: Invoice drawer opens with branded header (Konekt logo), line items, totals. data-testid='invoice-drawer' present.

GATE_3_PDF_DOWNLOAD.details: Download Invoice button calls /api/pdf/invoices/{id}, returns application/pdf content type. data-testid='download-invoice-btn' present.

GATE_4_CONDITIONAL_PAY_BUTTON.details: Pay button is conditional: 'Pay Invoice' for pending_payment, 'Pay Balance' for partially_paid, no button for paid/under_review. Verified both states.

GATE_5_ADMIN_ORDERS_TABLE.details: Admin orders at /admin/orders-ops shows full-width table with Date column on left. Row click opens drawer. data-testid='admin-orders-table' and 'admin-order-drawer' present.

GATE_6_VENDOR_FULFILLMENT.details: Vendor sees fulfillment jobs at /partner/fulfillment via /api/partner-portal/fulfillment-jobs. Shows job cards with tabs (All Jobs, Pending, Accepted, In Progress, Completed, Issues).

GATE_7_ADMIN_INVOICES_TABLE.details: Admin invoices at /admin/invoices shows full-width table with Date column on left. Row click opens drawer. data-testid='admin-invoices-table' and 'admin-invoice-drawer' present.

ADMIN_SIDEBAR_WHITE_SHELL.details: AdminLayout.js line 107 uses 'bg-white border-r border-gray-200' for sidebar (not dark blue).

INVOICE_COLLECTION_CANONICAL.details: All invoice APIs use db.invoices collection exclusively. collection_mode_service.py returns db.invoices.

ADMIN_INVOICE_ROUTE_PREFIX.details: Admin invoices route is /api/admin/invoices (not /api/admin/invoices-v2). invoice_routes.py line 20.
